items.title: Prime Video announces Lily Allen documentary, coming to streaming in 2027
items.summary: The upcoming film will chart the life and work of Lily Allen, from her early years through to 'West End Girl.'

items.title: Amazon will share its Q2 2026 earnings on July 30
items.summary: On July 30, Amazon is set to hold a conference call to discuss its Q2 2026 financial results.

items.title: 10 things to know about AWS’s new compute leader Dave Treadwell
items.summary: Now the Senior Vice President of Compute and Machine Learning Services, Treadwell joined Amazon almost by accident and was one of the coders
